judge.reason: The function is an URB completion callback handling RX data: it checks status, allocates skb, copies data, queues it, and resubmits or cleans up the URB. The only refcount operation (usb_anchor_urb) is incidental to managing the urb lifecycle and not the primary purpose. The function does not expose a reference-counted object to the caller; it operates internally on the urb.
